titleStmt.title: SII 4.1165: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1165. (A.R. No. 295 of 1893). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Āsīccrīvelanāṁḍunāmni viṣayē yēlēṟiti khyāpitō grāmastatra mahādhipō budhanidhiḥ śrībhīmanāthāhvayaḥ . bhāryyā
tasya guṇānvitā kulavadhūrmrāṇāṁbikā supratā putrōyaṁ sujanō babhūva vinayādhārastayōrmmuddanaḥ [. 1*] kīrttiśrīmahi
māspadō mahitaṁ śśauryyōrjjitō bhbhūtalē śrīmadgoṁkkamahīpatēśśirasijaprakṣālanaikakṣamaḥ prakhyātaḥ patikāryyadakṣa yi
ti tatkāruṇyapātrassudhīrāsīdbāṁddhavavārijākararavirvvairībhapaṁcānanaḥ [. 2*] śākābdānāṁ pramāṇē rasaśikhariviyaccaṁdra saṁkhyāmupē
tē caitrēśuklē supakṣēṣṭamiviṣusahitē saumyavārē sulagnē.prādātkarppūravarttīyutamativimalaṁ dīpamācaṁdratāraṁ bhīmēśāyāti
bhaktyā prabalatarayeśā rājatē muddanākhyaḥ [. 3*] śakavarṣaṁbulu 1076 gunēṇṭi viṣumasaṁkrāṁti nimittamuna śrīmanmahāmaṇḍalēśvara ku
lōttuṁgacōḍagoṁkarājula mudiseli talayaṁṭṭu muddanāyakuṇḍu śrībhīmēśvaramahādēvarakuṁ beṭṭina Akhaṇḍavartti lōhadaṇḍu divi
ya 1 ṇṭiki bōlu nālvuruṁ būṇṭagā reṇḍavunaḍapuna beyyanabōyuni vasamunaṁ beṭṭina InpaEḍlu 50 ṇṭikiṁ golavaṁgala nē māna 1 likhitaṁ pe
ddanācāryyēṇa [.]
Digital edition of SII 4.1165 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
